title: Why Is EQT Corporation (EQT) Up 0.6% Since Last Earnings Report?
text: EQT Corporation (EQT) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?

title: EQT Completes Acquisition of Tug Hill and XcL Midstream
text: PITTSBURGH , Aug. 22, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- EQT Corporation (NYSE: EQT) ("EQT" or the "Company") today announced it has closed its previously announced acquisition of THQ Appalachia I Midco, LLC ("Tug Hill") and THQ-XcL Holdings I Midco, LLC ("XcL Midstream"). Final consideration after purchase price adjustments was comprised of approximately $2.4 billion of cash and 49.6 million shares of EQT common stock.

title: This Energy Stock Outperforms The Market Despite A Q2 Loss
text: EQT stock broke out above a buy point Monday as the top natural gas producer is expected to shake off lower gas prices.

title: EQT-Quantum Energy Deal Faces FTC Check to Protect Competition
text: EQT's board seat denied to Quantum Energy Partners in order to resolve antitrust concerns and maintain competition in the industry.

title: US FTC approves deal for natgas producer EQT to buy THQ Appalachia
text: EQT Corp , the biggest U.S. natural gas producer, said on Wednesday that it had won antitrust approval to close a deal to buy Quantum Energy-backed THQ Appalachia I LLC and associated infrastructure.

title: EQT Clear to Close Acquisition of Tug Hill and XcL Midstream
text: PITTSBURGH , Aug. 16, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- EQT Corporation (NYSE: EQT) ("EQT" or the "Company") today announced that the U.S. Federal Trade Commission (the "FTC") has resolved its review of EQT's agreement with THQ Appalachia I, LLC ("Tug Hill") and THQ-XcL Holdings I, LLC ("XcL Midstream") to acquire Tug Hill's upstream assets and XcL Midstream's gathering and processing assets pursuant to an Agreement Containing Consent Order entered into among the parties to the transactions and the FTC effective as of today. Tug Hill and XcL Midstream are backed by equity commitments from funds managed by Quantum Energy Partners.
